T1.assign_text: Tonight, remember to give Mei the book when she visits.
T1.recap_text: Give Mei the book when she visits
greeting_lines: Hi! It smells great in here.
I am glad I made it before dinner.

reminders.EC+: Remember what you promised after you and Mei played games and ate pastries last time.
reminders.EC-: You promised to give Mei something.

T2.assign_text: Tonight, remember to give Anna-Lina the chocolate when she visits.
T2.recap_text: Give Anna-Lina the chocolate when she visits
greeting_lines: I came straight here after work.

reminders.EC+: Remember what Anna-Lina asked after she studied with you recently.
reminders.EC-: You promised to give Anna-Lina something.

T3.assign_text: Tonight, remember to give Tom the apple juice when he calls.
T3.recap_text: Give Tom the apple juice when he calls
greeting_lines: I should arrive in a few minutes.

reminders.EC+: Remember what Tom asked after you had a picnic together recently.
reminders.EC-: You promised to do something for Tom.

T4.assign_text: Tonight, remember to give the delivery person the trash bags when they call.
T4.recap_text: Give the delivery person the trash bags when they call
greeting_lines: Hello, I am confirming your delivery order.
Is there anything else you want to add?

reminders.EC+: Remember what you noticed after the delivery person dropped off a package recently.
reminders.EC-: You wanted to add something to your delivery order.

doorbell: Hi, I just came to drop this off.
No need to do anything right now.
phone_call: Hi, just confirming I reached the right number.
